heading: Tonight
text: A good chance of showers or thunderstorms north, more scattered in the south. Strong storms could produce gusty winds and heavy downpours. Warm and muggy. Lows in the 60s. Southwest wind 10 to 15 mph.

heading: Friday
text: Partly sunny. A chance of scattered showers and thunderstorms. Highs ranging from the 70s to mid 80s north to south. Light wind becoming north near 10 mph.

heading: Friday Night
text: Mostly clear north, partly clear south. Any evening showers south ending. Chance of valley fog. Lows in the 50s to low 60s. North wind, diminishing to light and variable.
